summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI Bond Trading System MVP. Backend APIs working correctly, frontend UI functional with real-time WebSocket updates, authentication system secure, and all core trading features operational.

minor_bugs.issue: Admin trades endpoint returns empty array instead of expected data structure

integration_issues.issue: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height)

passed_tests: Dashboard loads with all components (status cards, charts, controls)
Market data chart rendering (WTI vs Bond Ispread)
Kill Switch activation and HALT status
Risk Guard Engine with Black Swan probability
Trade History page navigation and functionality
Search and filter functionality in Trade History
